overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a serene historic courtyard featuring a central stone fountain, lush vegetation, and flying birds. The stationary camera captures the peaceful atmosphere of a stone-walled garden with distant mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone courtyard with central fountain and garden

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the courtyard fountain and surrounding garden from a fixed vantage point

notable_agents.action: white birds flying through the courtyard, landing on the fountain edge and taking off

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with water basin, central spout, and weathered texture
tall historic stone wall with arched gateway and decorative stonework
tall leafy green trees framing the left side of the courtyard
tall leafy green trees framing the right side of the courtyard
clusters of purple flowers growing along the left pathway edge
vintage black metal and stone lantern post on the right foreground
bushes with white flowers lining the courtyard perimeter
weathered gray cobblestone paving surrounding the fountain

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a historic stone courtyard centered on a circular fountain. The scene features lush spring vegetation including flowering bushes and tall trees, with a stone wall and archway in the background. White birds fly through the open space, occasionally landing on the fountain edge, while distant mountains are visible under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic gaze over a historic stone courtyard that maintains a serene and timeless atmosphere. It begins centered on a circular stone fountain, where the stillness is punctuated by the movement of white birds gliding through the open air. As the birds occasionally descend to land on the fountain's edge, the view encompasses the surrounding lush spring vegetation, including flowering bushes and towering trees. The scene then extends toward the background, revealing a weathered stone wall and an archway that frames a vista of distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.
